languages.text: "Причудливая вязь метафор, но содержащая удивительно глубокий смысл". {n}Эоганн внимательно слушает речь арлекина, загибая пальцы в такт ударным слогам стихов.{/n} "Пентаметрическое стихосложение. Неожиданный выбор, но приятный для моих аудиальных рецепторов".

"A bizarre tapestry of metaphors, yet containing a surprisingly deep meaning." {n}Eogunn listens closely to the Harlequin's recital, counting off on his fingers in rhythm with the stressed syllables of the poem.{/n} "Iambic pentameter. An unexpected choice, yet pleasing to my auditory receptors."
languages.original_text: "Причудливая вязь метафор, но содержащая удивительно глубокий смысл". {n}Эоганн внимательно слушает речь арлекина, загибая пальцы в такт ударным слогам стихов.{/n} "Пентаметрическое стихосложение. Неожиданный выбор, но приятный для моих аудиальных рецепторов".

traits.locale_text: "A bizarre tapestry of metaphors, yet containing a surprisingly deep meaning." {n}Eogunn listens closely to the Harlequin's recital, counting off on his fingers in rhythm with the stressed syllables of the poem.{/n} "Pentameter verse. An unexpected choice, yet pleasing to my auditory receptors."

"A bizarre tapestry of metaphors, yet containing a surprisingly deep meaning." {n}Eogunn listens closely to the Harlequin's recital, counting off on his fingers in rhythm with the stressed syllables of the poem.{/n} "Pentameter verse. An unexpected choice, yet pleasing to my auditory receptors."

"A bizarre tapestry of metaphors, yet containing a surprisingly deep meaning." {n}Eogunn listens closely to the Harlequin's recital, counting off on his fingers in rhythm with the stressed syllables of the poem.{/n} "Iambic pentameter. An unexpected choice, yet pleasing to my auditory receptors."

"A bizarre tapestry of metaphors, yet containing a surprisingly deep meaning." {n}Eogunn listens closely to the Harlequin's recital, counting off on his fingers in rhythm with the stressed syllables of the poem.{/n} "Iambic pentameter. An unexpected choice, yet pleasing to my auditory receptors."

languages.text: «Un extraño tapiz de metáforas que, sin embargo, contiene un significado sorprendentemente profundo». {n}Eogunn escucha con atención el recital del Arlequín, contando con los dedos el ritmo de las sílabas tónicas del poema.{/n} «Una sonoridad excelente. Inesperado, pero agradable para mis receptores auditivos».
languages.original_text: "A bizarre tapestry of metaphors, yet containing a surprisingly deep meaning." {n}Eogunn listens closely to the Harlequin's recital, counting off on his fingers in rhythm with the stressed syllables of the poem.{/n} "Iambic pentameter. An unexpected choice, yet pleasing to my auditory receptors."

traits.locale_text: «Un extraño tapiz de metáforas que, sin embargo, contiene un significado sorprendentemente profundo». {n}Eogunn escucha con atención el recital del Arlequín, contando con los dedos el ritmo de las sílabas tónicas del poema.{/n} «Una sonoridad excelente. Inesperado, pero agradable para mis receptores auditivos».

languages.text: “一连串古怪的隐喻，却蕴含着出奇深邃的含义。”{n}伊奥贡仔细聆听着那丑角的吟诵，手指随着诗中的重音轻轻敲打节拍。{/n}“抑扬格五音步。出乎意料的选择，不过我的听觉感受器对此相当满意。”
languages.original_text: "A bizarre tapestry of metaphors, yet containing a surprisingly deep meaning." {n}Eogunn listens closely to the Harlequin's recital, counting off on his fingers in rhythm with the stressed syllables of the poem.{/n} "Iambic pentameter. An unexpected choice, yet pleasing to my auditory receptors."

traits.locale_text: “一连串古怪的隐喻，却蕴含着出奇深邃的含义。”{n}伊奥贡仔细聆听着那丑角的吟诵，手指随着诗中的重音轻轻敲打节拍。{/n}“抑扬格五音步。出乎意料的选择，不过我的听觉感受器对此相当满意。”

languages.text: "Ein bizarres Bild aus Metaphern mit einer erstaunlich tiefen Bedeutung. {n}Eogunn hört dem Harlekin aufmerksam zu und zählt mit seinen Fingern die betonten Silben des Gedichtes.{/n} "Jambischer Pentameter. Eine ungewöhnliche Wahl, aber angenehm für meine akustischen Rezeptoren."
languages.original_text: "A bizarre tapestry of metaphors, yet containing a surprisingly deep meaning." {n}Eogunn listens closely to the Harlequin's recital, counting off on his fingers in rhythm with the stressed syllables of the poem.{/n} "Iambic pentameter. An unexpected choice, yet pleasing to my auditory receptors."

traits.locale_text: "Ein bizarres Bild aus Metaphern mit einer erstaunlich tiefen Bedeutung. {n}Eogunn hört dem Harlekin aufmerksam zu und zählt mit seinen Fingern die betonten Silben des Gedichtes.{/n} "Jambischer Pentameter. Eine ungewöhnliche Wahl, aber angenehm für meine akustischen Rezeptoren."

languages.text: « Une curieuse mosaïque de métaphores, abritant néanmoins un sens étonnement profond. » {n}Eogunn écoute attentivement le récital de l'Arlequin, comptant en rythme sur ses doigts les syllabes accentuées du poème.{/n} « Pentamètre iambique. Un choix inattendu, mais particulièrement agréable à mes récepteurs auditifs. »
languages.original_text: "A bizarre tapestry of metaphors, yet containing a surprisingly deep meaning." {n}Eogunn listens closely to the Harlequin's recital, counting off on his fingers in rhythm with the stressed syllables of the poem.{/n} "Iambic pentameter. An unexpected choice, yet pleasing to my auditory receptors."

traits.locale_text: « Une curieuse mosaïque de métaphores, abritant néanmoins un sens étonnement profond. » {n}Eogunn écoute attentivement le récital de l'Arlequin, comptant en rythme sur ses doigts les syllabes accentuées du poème.{/n} « Pentamètre iambique. Un choix inattendu, mais particulièrement agréable à mes récepteurs auditifs. »

languages.text: "Tuhaf bir metafor dokusu... Yine de şaşırtıcı derecede derin bir anlam içeriyor." {n}Eogunn, şiirin vurgulu heceleriyle uyumlu bir şekilde parmaklarıyla ritim tutarak Arleken'i dikkatle dinliyor.{/n} "Beşli ölçü. Beklenmedik bir seçim olsa da işitsel alıcılarımı memnun ediyor."
languages.original_text: "A bizarre tapestry of metaphors, yet containing a surprisingly deep meaning." {n}Eogunn listens closely to the Harlequin's recital, counting off on his fingers in rhythm with the stressed syllables of the poem.{/n} "Iambic pentameter. An unexpected choice, yet pleasing to my auditory receptors."

traits.locale_text: "Tuhaf bir metafor dokusu... Yine de şaşırtıcı derecede derin bir anlam içeriyor." {n}Eogunn, şiirin vurgulu heceleriyle uyumlu bir şekilde parmaklarıyla ritim tutarak Arleken'i dikkatle dinliyor.{/n} "Beşli ölçü. Beklenmedik bir seçim olsa da işitsel alıcılarımı memnun ediyor."

languages.text: 「奇妙な比喩の織りなす詩だが、意外な深みがある。」{n}イオグンはハーレクインの詩の朗読に耳を傾け、詩の抑揚に合わせて指を動かしている。{/n}「五音節の詩。予想外だが、私の聴覚に心地よい。」
languages.original_text: "A bizarre tapestry of metaphors, yet containing a surprisingly deep meaning." {n}Eogunn listens closely to the Harlequin's recital, counting off on his fingers in rhythm with the stressed syllables of the poem.{/n} "Iambic pentameter. An unexpected choice, yet pleasing to my auditory receptors."
